name: Mexican Red Onion Soup (Vegan)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a stockpot or 5-quart Dutch oven, heat the oil over low heat.
2. Add the onions and cook, stirring frequently, for 30 minutes or until softened and lightly colored.
3. Sprinkle the onions with the sugar, oregano, coriander, cumin, allspice, and cinnamon; cook an additional 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the vinegar and orange juice and cook for 4 more minutes.
5. Sprinkle with the flour and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
6. Stir in the stock and bring to a boil over moderate heat. Adjust the heat so that the mixture simmers gently; cover and cook an additional 20 minutes.
7. Stir in the salt and pepper. Serves 8-11/2 cups. Per serving: calories 159, fat 6g, sodium 256mg, cholesterol 0mg, calories from fat 34%.
